description: Iman Motamity introduces the Solana Incubator Cohort 2 Demo Day, highlighting the program's focus on scaling knowledge and supporting ecosystem growth. The cohort aims to drive real-world adoption of Solana through six teams working on various projects. Manish Dutta from Alpha Ledger discusses their efforts in tokenizing real-world assets, emphasizing their experience and partnerships.
topic_summary: The Solana Incubator Cohort 2 focuses on fostering real-world adoption of Solana through collaborative projects. Key presentations include insights from Manish Dutta of Alpha Ledger on tokenizing real-world assets and the importance of institutional partnerships.
